label: Interactive Robotic Figure in C/C++
title: Interactive Robotic Figure in C/C++
description:
Achieved real-time audio-to-motion translation for an interactive robotic figure, demonstrated through 100+ live conversation demos and 16K+ social media views, by developing an embedded C++ audio processing pipeline that synchronizes voice actor speech with robotic mouth movement via I2C communication.
Improved embedded system performance by designing a multithreaded architecture for concurrent audio processing and motor control, optimizing CPU usage and ensuring responsive, lifelike motion
technologies: C, C++, I2C, Multi-Threading, Servo Motors

label: Computer Vision Spell Casting
title: Computer Vision based spell detection
description:
Built a distributed edge-AI interactive system combining a custom Android app and embedded hardware to detect gesture-based spells using on-device computer vision and speech recognition, triggering real-time physical actuation
Designed a multi-device MQTT architecture where mobile inference publishes events to an embedded broker controlling hardware, alongside a Python/Flask dashboard streaming activity and spell detections across the network.
technologies: Python, AI/ML, Computer Vision, Aurdino UNO Q [Linux machine + Microcontroller]

label: ML Modeling Theme Park Wait Times
title: Predictive Modeling of Theme Park Wait Times
description: Built and evaluated linear regression and machine learning models in order to investigate correlation between physical ride characteristics and guest demand, using wait times as proxy for guest demand

label: Campus Events Planner Application
title: Campus Events Planner Web Application in JavaScript
description:
Developed a functional web application for discovering and organizing campus events
Used HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Integrated storage system for event tracking
Measured success through consistent user engagement and successful event sign-ups during user testing

label: TEA @ UCSD Site
title: Themed Entertainment Association at UCSD Website
description:
Developed and maintained the Themed Entertainment Association at UCSD's website
Used Tailwind CSS for styling
Significantly boosted the club's digital presence
Increased online engagement and visibility
technologies: Tailwind CSS, HTML, JavaScript, Github Actions

label: Multithreaded File Compressor in C++
title: Multithreaded File Compressor in C++
description:
Multithreaded application for high speed file compression
Optimized for performance using parallel processing
